$comment: Corevo back-office — full structural spec. The authoritative COMPONENT CODE is in ./components/*.jsx (React 18 + inline JSX, plain CSS-in-JS via the design tokens in tokens.json). This file describes WHAT each surface/screen/component is and how it behaves, so the build is exact, not guessed. Fidelity: HIGH (pixel-level; colors/typography/spacing are final).

meta.product: Corevo — white-label booking SaaS for salons
meta.stack_reference: React 18.3.1 + Babel inline JSX. Recreate in target codebase (React/Next/etc.) using its patterns; lift exact tokens + layout from components/.
meta.entry: components/index.html (loads data.js, super-data.js, icons.jsx, Shell.jsx, then screen files, then App.jsx)
meta.twoWorlds: NEVER mix. [data-world=backoffice] = Corevo forest/gold system (super/salon/staff). [data-world=storefront] = per-tenant salon theme; the CUSTOMER portal lives here (salvia theme).
meta.roleSwitcher: Demo-only floating switch (Super/Salong/Frisör/Kund) — top center. In production these are separate authenticated apps/role-gated routes.

primitives.StatusBadge: booking status: avbokad=danger 'Avbokad'; klar=success 'Klar'/'Klar · betald'; else gold 'Bokad'.
primitives.Button: props: variant(primary forest | gold | ghost outline | subtle | danger), size(sm|md), icon, iconRight, disabled. radius 10, weight 600.
primitives.Card: white paper, 1px line, radius 16, shadow-sm, pad 22 (override via pad). optional onClick.
primitives.Stat: KPI card: label(eyebrow) + value(display 34, forest, tabular-nums, nowrap) + delta(success green w/ trendUp) + icon(top-right tile) + hint.
primitives.PageHead: eyebrow + h1 + sub(max 560) on left; action buttons on right (flex-wrap).
primitives.Toggle: row: title(+optional 'live' Aktiv/Av pill) + desc + 46×26 switch. Wired truthfully.
primitives.Field: labeled input + hint. focus border => forest.
primitives.Table: header row (uppercase 11.5 ink-3); rows hover paper-2; onRow(index) clickable; last col right-aligned.
primitives.Drawer: full-height right slide-over (legacy). Still used in SuperData (forms). props: open,onClose,title,sub,accent,children,footer,width.
primitives.DetailModal: LIGHT centered detail card (iPad-friendly). REPLACED the heavy drawer for detail views in salon Bokningar/Kunder/Personal + staff Idag. ~480px wide, auto-height max 86vh, radius 20, backdrop blur, dismiss on outside tap. Same API as Drawer.
primitives.SubTabs: underlined tab row (used in tenant detail). props: tabs[[label,icon]], active, onPick.
primitives.TableChip: info-toned chip showing the REAL backend table/flow a no-code control maps to (e.g. 'tenant_settings.review_link'). Signals 'Supabase-with-my-UI'.
primitives.Icon: components/icons.jsx — Lucide-derived set (currentColor, 1.75 stroke). Names referenced throughout.

shell.Sidebar: 244px forest sidebar. Grouped nav (group headers). active item: forest-700 bg + 2px gold left border. props: role, active, onNav, override({brand,sub}) for support-mode.
shell.Topbar: search button that opens CommandPalette (⌘K hint) + context action (super:Supabase / salon:Se din sida) + bell.
shell.CommandPalette: ⌘K/Ctrl+K. Fuzzy across nav targets + tenants + customers + quick actions. Arrow/Enter nav. props: open,onClose,role,onNav,onOpenTenant.

store.note: Single live store shared across ALL surfaces — makes röd tråd literal. Seeded from data.js BOOKINGS/CUSTOMERS.

actions.cancel(id, by): status=>avbokad, paid=false, append system note, fire toast 'tid frigjord — åter på storefront'. (slot returns to storefront)
actions.setPrivacy(custId, showAs): full|first|initial display-name choice (customer-controlled; reflects in admin)

super.$comment: Zivar's platform control center (M7). 'Supabase-kraft med mitt UI — klicka och lek med allt, röd tråd, meningsfulla flikar. Premium utan kod.' = operational data control, NOT look.
super.data: components/super-data.js (window.SU): TENANTS, ONBOARD_STEPS, VARIANTS, CUSTOMERS, STAFF, AUDIT, INTEGRATIONS, PERMS, ROLES, HEALTH, TREND

Översikt.layout: health pills row; 4 KPI (one is bokningar w/ Sparkline of SU.TREND); 2-col: left=Alla salonger Table (row click => openTenant); right=Senaste händelser (audit feed) + 'Premium utan kod' CTA card.

Salonger.layout: search + status filter (Alla/Aktiv/Pausad/Onboarding) + view switch (Kort/Lista). Cards show owner/city/bookings/staff/variant/level; click => tenant detail. Lista = clean Table (same style preferred elsewhere).

Onboarda salong.purpose: Zivar creates tenants (atomic: slug+settings+ownerrole). NO forced required fields.
Onboarda salong.note: Custom domain (step 5 of stege) parked; level-3 CSS overrides via code only.

Fakturering.layout: 3 KPI + Table per tenant: modell(per_booking/flat_monthly), completed bookings, rate, underlag amount. Export. Manual invoicing.

Kunder.purpose: cross-tenant customer lookup — the ops data control.
Kunder.layout: 4 KPI; search + tenant filter; Table(name/tenant/role/auth/lastLogin/status); row => Drawer with operative actions: SEND PASSWORD RESET, send magic-link, copy email. 'Lägg till kund' drawer (no required fields).
Kunder.couplingNote: every action logged in audit with Zivar as actor.

Personal.layout: 4 KPI; SERVICE_ROLE_KEY warning banner; search + status filter; Table(name/tenant/role/services/invited/status) with 'Påminn' for pending; 'Bjud in personal' drawer (email+salong+role; magic-link).

Drift & logg.layout: health pills; search + actor filter (Alla/Zivar/System/Kund); audit_log list. Includes the deliberately-BLOCKED frisor3 deletion (audit-guard).

Integrationer.layout: cards per integration (Stripe/Google/SMS/Email/Cloudflare/POS) w/ status + tenants count + TableChip(flow) + Hantera/Docs.

Roller.layout: 2-col: role list (left) + selected role detail + permission MATRIX (areas × levels full/own/view/none) w/ legend. private.tenant_id() isolation.

Inställningar.layout: Säkerhet (MFA, IP-whitelist, audit-guard) + Drift (auto-klar, daily digest) + Fakturering model note. Every toggle truthful.

tenantDetail.purpose: open a salon => full no-code control. props: slug, onBack, onAssist.
tenantDetail.header: back link + avatar + name + status badge + meta; actions: Öppna storefront, Lösenordsreset, 'Hjälp salongen' (=> support mode).

subtabs.Översikt: 4 KPI (bokningar/completade/kunder/personal) + onboarding-stege (deriveOnboarding, step5 domän locked) + owner card (reset/copy) + customization-level note.
subtabs.Data: edit tenant grunddata (tenants) + Google review link (tenant_settings.review_link) + customers table. No required fields, save-without-deploy. TableChips throughout.
subtabs.Personal: invite staff (magic-link) + staff table for this tenant.
subtabs.Branding: token-branding no-code (temamall select, primary color) + LIVE ThemePreview; note: level-3 scoped CSS = code only.
subtabs.Drift: suspend/activate (suspend => public storefront blocked, data untouched) + audit-log + DANGER ZONE: 'Försök radera tenant' => BLOCKED by audit-guard (build-once-never-delete).

supportMode.$comment: Zivar helps a salon REMOTE from his admin without logging into their side.
supportMode.enter: tenant detail 'Hjälp salongen' => App enters role=salon with assist={slug,name}.
supportMode.ui: gold AssistBanner top: 'Support-läge · Du hjälper <salon> remote — allt loggas' + 'Tillbaka till plattform'. Sidebar brand overrides to salon name + 'SUPPORT · COREVO'. Salon dashboard greeting becomes 'Du hjälper Elin'.
supportMode.exit: returns to super + that tenant's detail.

salon.$comment: Salon owner admin (M6). The owner is Zivar's customer ('kund'). Goal: focus on bookings + cutting; rest accessible 'if something happens'. Not a chore — a control tool you WANT to be in.

Dashboard.layout: greeting (support-aware) + QuickAction row (Dagens bokningar/Ny bokning/Lägg till kund/Se din sida) + 4 KPI + 2-col: left=Kommande idag list + Dagens topptimmar (PeakChart); right=Tjänste-mix (MixBar) + 'Din sida live' + Stripe status.

views: Vecka (ALL 7 days Mön–Sön, Sön=Stängt, today highlighted, slots+bookings, horizontal scroll)
Bokningar.note: ONLY these two views (Tidslinje/Tavla removed). View choice persisted in localStorage.
Bokningar.detail: click booking => DetailModal (light, centered) with status, customer summary + mini-stats (favStaff/senaste/poäng), time-bound PII reveal, service grid, notes/chat, actions (Avboka/Markera klar/Markera betald/Öppna igen). Live-coupling explainer banner + 'avboka => slot freed on storefront'.

Kunder.purpose: recognize returning customers without exposing PII
Kunder.layout: 4 KPI + search + Table; row => DetailModal with identity (lasting) + privacy display-name control + time-bound PII + loyalty + history.

Tjänster.purpose: service CRUD + WHERE on storefront it lands
Tjänster.layout: Table(name/dur/price/storefront-section select/online toggle/edit) + live 'Var det syns på hemsidan' placement map. No required fields.

Schema.purpose: EXPLICIT bookable start times (not fixed hours)
Schema.layout: per-stylist chips + 7-day grid; add/remove uneven start times; service length drives slot length. Boot-imported from current pattern.

Personal.purpose: more than CRUD — real day + own-account control
Personal.layout: staff cards w/ bio/specialties/'Eget konto'|'Hanteras här' badge + today count; click => DetailModal: about + EGET KONTO toggle (on=stylist logs in, own quick view/calendar; off=managed in salon page) + multi-location note + real day mirror.

Varumärke.purpose: live storefront preview; change image/color/font/text without deploy; undo
Varumärke.note: color/font read as runtime tenant_settings, not build-inlined. Preview renders in the STOREFRONT world (proves editor drives the salon's own site).

toggles: Betalning vid bokning (+ no false klar+betald guard)

staff.$comment: Stylist's own page (M5 mirror). Maja Lund logged in. Focus: cut, don't fiddle with admin. The recognition tool that lets the stylist 'ha koll'.

Idag.layout: Nästa kund hero card + booking cards (each shows STAMKUND badge if visits>=5, preference chips, inline customer message). Click any => DetailModal 'StaffRecognition'.
Idag.recognition: DetailModal shows: tier/visits, senaste besök, BRUKAR KOMMA var N:e vecka, BJUDS PÅ drink, customer message, 'Det du vet om X' (prefs), DITT MINNE (private editable memo textarea), tidigare besök. This is the same CUST_PROFILE data the customer feels remembered by (röd tråd).

Mitt schema.layout: 7-day week grid; booked slots highlighted, free slots dashed.

Frånvaro.layout: type chips + date range + 'absence auto-closes bookable slots on storefront' note + upcoming list with Godkänd/Väntar.

customer.$comment: Customer portal (M4). Studio Salvia storefront world (salvia theme — NOT Corevo green). Goal: 'shit, min frisör har koll på mig'. Logged-in customer: Sara Lind (c3).

sections.Greeting: Hej <first> + personal teaser if a booking is today ('Vi ses idag 11:30 hos Elin — färg & slingor').
sections.Din frisör (StylistCard): EMOTIONAL CORE. Stylist avatar+name, 'din frisör sedan <year> · ni har setts N gånger', a warm handwritten note (italic serif), 'Det här minns Elin om dig' (prefs chips + drink — same as stylist memo), 'Din stil hos Elin' (saved looks placeholders, horizontal scroll), Boka hos Elin + Skriv till Elin.
sections.Lojalitet: tier + points + progress to next tier (what it unlocks).
sections.Din vanliga (UsualCard): smart rebook in one tap: usual service+stylist, 'du brukar boka var N:e vecka · senast <date>', 'Boka din vanliga'.
sections.Mina bokningar (MyBooking): upcoming card: day/time + service + 'hos <staff>' + Omboka/Avboka (avboka => store.cancel, frees slot live) + message box (=> note on booking row, lands with stylist). Cancelled shown dimmed.
sections.Tidigare besök: history list w/ price + points earned.
sections.Integritet (PrivacyPanel): customer-controlled display name (full/first/initial; reflects in salon system) + editable contact + 'spara mina uppgifter' consent toggle (else purged after visit).

couplings_rod_trad: Cancel a booking on ANY surface => status avbokad + slot returns to storefront (M3 logic, shown in M6).
Customer message (portal or booking) => lands as note on the booking row for the stylist/admin — not an email thread.
Customer display-name choice (portal Integritet) => reflected in salon admin customer view (custName).
Service online+section (salon Tjänster) => WHERE it appears on storefront (M6->M2), no deploy.
Stylist memo + prefs (CUST_PROFILE) => the SAME data that makes the customer feel remembered in the portal ('Det här minns Elin om dig').
Token-branding (super tenant detail / salon Varumärke) => repaints storefront via tenant_settings at runtime, no deploy. Level-3 = code only.
Suspend tenant (super) => public storefront blocked immediately; data untouched.
Absence (staff Frånvaro) => auto-closes bookable slots on storefront for the period.

files.components/data.js: salon-world demo data (window.BO): SALONS, CUSTOMERS, SERVICES, STAFF, BOOKINGS, WEEK_DAYS(7), SLOT_TEMPLATE, SERVICE_MIX, PEAK_HOURS, CUST_PROFILE, custName()
files.components/SuperTenant.jsx: super: deep tenant detail + support-mode entry
files.components/App.jsx: role + section routing, tenant detail, support mode, ⌘K wiring
files.colors_and_type.css: the two-worlds CSS (tokens + type roles + storefront themes)
